conservative.name: Beguiling Persuasion
conservative.requirements:
4 Power
Target able to see and hear you

success.description: As you speak, your words magically weave into pleasing compliments and persuasive arguments that fall perfectly in line with your target's frame of mind. you influence the target
As above, and if appropriate, you influence the target again

bane.description: Add to all Social checks while this card is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: You warp the mind of your target, making it hard for him to refute your case. The target gains the Perplexed condition while this card is recharging

reckless.name: Beguiling Persuasion
reckless.requirements:
4 Power
Target able to see and hear you

success.description: As you speak, your words magically weave into befuddling and confusing arguments that leave your target too flummoxed to disagree with you. You influence the target
As above, and the target suffers 1 stress or 1 shame

bane.description: Add to all Social checks while this card is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: You warp the mind of your target, making it hard for him to refute your case. The target gains the Perplexed condition while this card is recharging
